name: Mshta Proxy Execution
description: Detects mshta.exe used for script execution and application control bypass
query:
// Detect mshta executing inline scripts or remote HTA files
// Trigger on mshta with vbscript, javascript, or http
events from edr_process
where exe_path matches "(?i)mshta\.exe$"
  and cmdline matches "(?i)(vbscript|javascript|http://|https://|about:)"
group by hostname
having count(*) > 0
within 60 seconds
